Welcome back, and this is the lead generation overview. This is just going to be the overview of what we're going over in lead generation. This will be the beefiest section in the training since this is the area that most people struggle the most with. So I'm gonna go over the strategy of what we're doing, which is gonna be the messenger stripped, which is actually how you're going to reach out and what sequence of questions you're gonna take someone through to get them to schedule a call with you, what that 10 minute call should look like, and what milestones we're trying to hit on that call so that we can increase the likelihood that they are going to schedule a show and buy from us in the subsequent sales call that we will set. That is just kind of the overarching strategy of what we're doing, and then the remaining part of lead generation is understanding how to set up your Instagram and Facebook profile so that you are maximizing the likelihood that someone wants to work with you, explaining the two different types of traffic between warm and cold, and then digging deep on different ways and strategies to do warm outreach on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn. And then same goes for cold outreach. So obviously we're doing this in sequence, so you'd want to exhaust all warm outreach things first, and you want to do that every day before you go to cold because your likelihood of success on cold is gonna be lower just by the nature of the fact that they don't know who you are, right? So there's a lower level of trust, which means there's more runway that has to happen, there's more selling that has to happen before the ultimate close occurs. And so I'll cover cold outreach on Instagram and Facebook since there's two that we have the most understanding of. Cool, awesome.
